industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Romande Energie Holding SA
summary: Romande Energie Holding SA engages in the production, distribution, and sale of electrical and thermal energy in Switzerland. The company generates electricity through hydraulic, solar, wind, and biomass plants. It also owns and operates distribution grids and natural-gas distribution pipelines; manages energy portfolios; offers heating, ventilation, air-conditioning, home automation, telecommunications, and IT solutions; and installs heating, ventilation, air-conditioning, and gas solutions. In addition, the company provides billing, call-center, and energy audit services; energy systems, including heat pumps, solar thermal energy, and solar photovoltaic energy services; lighting systems, such as public lighting and illumination services; and thermal systems solutions, as well as advisory services. Romande Energie Holding SA was founded in 1901 and is headquartered in Morges, Switzerland.
